server_id: # server_id        = unique name for this server config
# port             = port the server listens on
# connection_timeout_sec = seconds before a new connection is dropped if not established
# session_timeout_sec    = seconds of idle before session is considered dead
# heartbeat_frequency_sec = how often to ping clients
# max_missed_beats = how many missed heartbeats before disconnect
# max_sessions     = hard cap on simultaneous connected players
# cleanup_frequency_sec  = how often to sweep dead sessions
